description_long: This object is a slender, upright potted plant with multiple thin, woody stems branching out from a central base. The stems are adorned with small, narrow, lanceolate leaves that are spaced irregularly along their length, giving the plant a delicate and airy appearance. The foliage is a muted green with hints of yellow and brown, suggesting either natural color variation or slight dryness. The plant appears to be relatively sparse, with some stems arching outward more than others, creating an asymmetrical silhouette. There is no visible pot or container in the images, as the base of the stems is cropped or obscured. The overall look is naturalistic, making it suitable for urban landscaping or decorative use in parks and public spaces.
description: A slender, upright potted plant with thin woody stems and sparse, narrow green leaves, forming an airy, asymmetrical shape. The foliage shows muted green and yellowish tones, and the base is not visibly potted.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plant's central cluster of stems and the densest foliage, with leaves radiating outward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plant's asymmetrical spread, with several long stems arching to the right and sparser leaf coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plant's overall height and the vertical alignment of the main stems, with less visible leaf density.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the longest arching stem extending leftward, with a more open and sparse arrangement of leaves.
